narrative.intro: Not content with trying to kill you, Q'Narr has gone after another of your old companions. They're out of 'the business' and have been living clean for a few years, but you just got a tunnel-net message from his family, saying they had been attacked by armed goons.
narrative.briefing: Set up a building in the middle of the table with scattered natural terrain. Place 6 markers spread evenly around the table. Place your crew at a battlefield edge, not within 8" of a marker. No opponents initially present.
narrative.completion_win: All markers revealed or removed. Sympathetic locals cover all Upkeep costs next turn.
narrative.completion_lose: All crew become casualties. Remove any remaining markers.

campaign_turn_modifications.travel_destination: random previously visited world (or generate new)

shuttle_option.description: If ship not fit to travel or you prefer, take shuttle. Only 4 crew. Rest take shore leave.

deployment.crew_setup: at a battlefield edge, not within 8" of any marker

marker_table.description: Signs of the attackers. Record the Evidence.
Corpse of someone who worked here. Move into contact, roll 1D6: on 5-6 uncover Evidence.

marker_removal.check: end of each round, roll 1D6 for each remaining marker, removed on 1
marker_removal.removed_marker_evidence: Move into contact with location, roll 1D6: on 6, uncover Evidence

primary.description: Reveal or wait for removal of all 6 markers

end_conditions: All crew become casualties (remove remaining markers)

common.description: Sympathetic locals offer food, covering all Upkeep costs next campaign turn

post_event_check.trigger: start of each subsequent campaign turn
post_event_check.success: Found companion location, can play Event 6 when ready
post_event_check.failure: Still searching, gain +1 evidence, play normal campaign turn
